capability_declaration.rationale: IEEE 1547 specifies mandatory performance characteristics but lacks any mechanism for DERs or agents to dynamically declare capabilities, negotiate functional envelopes, or announce operational scope during interconnection.

bounded_authority.evidence: Sections 5.3 (Operating Ranges), Section 6 (Information Exchange for Advanced Operations)
bounded_authority.rationale: Defines explicit voltage/frequency ride-through curves and protection boundaries that constrain DER behavior; allows DSO/TPO configuration of control modes but lacks time-bound permissions or revocation semantics.

decision_auditability.rationale: No requirements exist for logging autonomous agent decisions, attributing automated responses to grid events, or maintaining audit trails of DER control actions beyond basic event recording.

data_governance.rationale: References communication interfaces and information exchange for interconnection but provides no framework on data ownership models, consent mechanisms, or retention policies specifically governing DER operational data.
